overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a dark forest at night, illuminated by a flashlight. The camera moves along a narrow dirt trail winding between rocky outcrops and dense pine trees, suggesting a survival or horror game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky forest trail with cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path, flashlight illuminating the rocky cliff wall on the left and the trail ahead

entered.detail: tall rock formation running parallel to the left side of the trail
dense coniferous trees lining the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow forest trail at night. A rocky cliff wall runs along the left side while dense pine trees line the right. The flashlight illuminates the dirt path ahead as the camera moves steadily forward through the enclosed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path with rocky outcrops

events.description: trail curves to the right as the path winds around the rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: following the curving trail deeper into the forest, navigating around the rocky outcrop that shifts to the right side

entered.detail: large boulder formation appearing on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: As the trail curves to the right, the rocky cliff on the left passes behind and a new rocky outcrop appears on the right. The path continues winding through dense pine forest, with the flashlight revealing the uneven dirt terrain and surrounding trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a narrow forest trail that winds between shifting rocky boundaries under the cover of night. It begins with the camera moving steadily forward, where a flashlight illuminates a dirt path flanked by a rocky cliff wall on the left and dense pine trees on the right. As the trail curves to the right, the cliff wall recedes behind the viewer and the enclosed terrain shifts. The scene then opens up to reveal a new rocky outcrop appearing on the right side of the path. Finally, the camera continues to wind through the dense pine forest, with the beam of light cutting through the darkness to reveal the uneven dirt terrain ahead.
